description: Fixed retrieval-quality set: a small labelled corpus + queries with relevant doc ids. The benchmark loads the corpus into an in-memory engine, runs each query under weighted-linear fusion and reciprocal-rank fusion, and compares nDCG@k / MRR. Doc ids here are local handles; the harness maps them to engine-generated ids.

corpus.content: the capital of france is paris
the eiffel tower is located in paris france
python is a popular programming language
javascript is a programming language that runs in the browser
user prefers dark mode in the code editor
user prefers tabs over spaces for indentation in the editor
the production server deployment completed successfully
the nightly database backup failed last night
the sun is a star at the center of the solar system
water boils at one hundred degrees celsius at sea level
the great wall of china visible from space is a myth
machine learning models require large amounts of training data

queries.query: what is the capital of france
training data for machine learning models
